assertions.description: Decoupling analysis correctly identifies 4 rails (VCC, VAA, +5V, +3.3V) with appropriate capacitors

INCORRECT: L3 value '600R/200mA' parsed as 600H inductance; this is a ferrite bead rated at 600 ohms impedance at 100MHz, not a 600H inductor. The LC filter with C43 at resonant_hz=5.31kHz is nonsensical as a result.
INCORRECT: L2 value '600R/200mA' has the same ferrite bead misparsing issue (600H), making the LC filter calculation with C14/C7 (resonant_hz=2.04Hz) invalid
INCORRECT: U4 (AP7365-3.3) output_rail is 'GND' which is incorrect; the output should be the +3.3V rail. The input_rail is also unnamed when it should connect to a power source.
